# Qc

Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.

**7 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `weave_adaptive_saturation_qc` | `experimental` | `native` | Detected-feature saturation relative to an adaptive depth envelope. | [weave_adaptive_saturation_qc](../generated/weave_adaptive_saturation_qc.md) |
| `weave_neighbor_discordance_qc` | `experimental` | `native` | Jensen-Shannon discordance between each observation and its neighbors. | [weave_neighbor_discordance_qc](../generated/weave_neighbor_discordance_qc.md) |
| `weave_spatial_entropy_qc` | `experimental` | `native` | Local expression-composition entropy for spatial QC. | [weave_spatial_entropy_qc](../generated/weave_spatial_entropy_qc.md) |
| `basic_qc` | `production` | `native` | Per-cell QC metrics + MAD-based outlier filtering. | [basic_qc](../generated/basic_qc.md) |

| `library_size_qc` | `production` | `native` | Library-size metric and configurable low-count flag. | [library_size_qc](../generated/library_size_qc.md) |
| `mitochondrial_qc` | `production` | `native` | Mitochondrial expression fraction and high-fraction flag. | [mitochondrial_qc](../generated/mitochondrial_qc.md) |

## Decision notes

### `basic_qc`

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Per-cell QC metrics + MAD-based outlier filtering.
- Full page: [basic_qc](../generated/basic_qc.md)

### `gene_complexity_qc`

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Detected-feature metric and low-complexity flag.
- Full page: [gene_complexity_qc](../generated/gene_complexity_qc.md)

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Library-size metric and configurable low-count flag.

### `mitochondrial_qc`

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Mitochondrial expression fraction and high-fraction flag.

### `weave_adaptive_saturation_qc`

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Detected-feature saturation relative to an adaptive depth envelope.

### `weave_neighbor_discordance_qc`

- Filter low-quality observations and genes before modelling.
- Jensen-Shannon discordance between each observation and its neighbors.
- Research incubator — do not treat as a production recommendation.
